releases.author: landnthrn
releases.description: ### What's New: - Fixed for all recommendations made by **ObsidianReviewBot** in the [GraphForge Pull Release](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/10239#issuecomment-3912080908) - Abbreviated the names of the build/refresh and removal buttons
releases.name: GraphForge v1.0.2

releases.author: landnthrn
releases.description: ### What's New: - Fixed for all recommendations made by **ObsidianReviewBot** in the [Pull Release for GraphForge](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/10239#issuecomment-3909893808) - **Console:** Switched debug logging to `console.debug` (only warn/error/debug allowed). - **Promises:** All fire-and-forget promises now use `void` or `.catch()` so they’re explicitly handled. - **No dynamic <style>:** Removed injected style elements; all CSS moved to `styles.css` (Obsidian loads it). - **Promise in void context:** Event/callback handlers that return promises now wrapped so they return void (e.g. `void fn()` or `Promise.resolve(...).then(...)`). - **Config folder:** Default excluded folders now use `Vault#configDir` instead of hardcoded `.obsidian` (supports custom config folder names). - **Settings tab styling:** Replaced all `element.style.*` with CSS classes in `styles.css` for better theming and maintainability. - **Sentence case:** Settings headings and labels updated to sentence case (e.g. “Graph creation”, “Build/refresh”). - **Section headings:** Replaced raw `h2` elements with `new Setting(containerEl).setName(...).setHeading()` for consistent Obsidian UI. - **Type assertions:** Removed unnecessary `as HTMLInputElement` / `as HTMLElement` where types were already correct. - **Regex:** Replaced control-character range `\x00-\x1f` with `\u0000-\u001F` to satisfy lint rules. - **Unused import:** Removed unused `HubSettings` import from commands. - **Remove hub notes:** “Remove foldersuffix(#) notes” now uses `FileManager.trashFile()` instead of `Vault.delete()` so hub notes go to trash and respect the user’s deletion preference. - **Unused variable:** Removed unused `folder` variable in `upsertHubLinkInNote`.
releases.name: GraphForge v1.0.1

releases.author: landnthrn
releases.description: **Initial public release of GraphForge for Obsidian** ### Features: - Automatic graph creation - Automatic graph maintenance - Quick access hub for each folder - Configurable setup
releases.name: GraphForge v1.0.0
